title: Add assignment media evidence workflow regression matrix
description: Extend QA regression coverage with a Wave 33 matrix that validates manager assignment evidence upload/list workflows plus baseline assignment detail stability and authorization guardrails.
acceptance_criteria: Wave 33 matrix covers assignment evidence empty, upload success, and list retrieval flows when backend readiness is present
Regression suite preserves baseline assignment detail and status-action behavior from Waves 31 and 32
Unauthorized, forbidden, invalid payload, unsupported-file, and not-found states remain deterministic
